title: disable front perspective
description: Disables front perspective in third person. When cycling through perspectives with the F5 key, this mod disables the front perspective.
body:
Disables front perspective in third person. When cycling through perspectives with the F5 key, this mod disables the front perspective.

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jJPzL6zj/images/4408eb15bb6b7d6eb514171a38924ed48985a60a.gif)
